title: Clay clay.yaml
description: Configuration for Clay template generation from a reference project. The clay.yaml file uses YAML syntax; this JSON Schema describes the parsed object shape for editor validation and tooling.

reference.description: Path to the reference project root, relative to the project root (the directory containing clay.yaml) or absolute.

target.description: Path to the template output root, relative to the project root or absolute.

ignore.description: Gitignore-style glob patterns. Matching files under the reference directory are excluded from template output. Patterns use POSIX forward slashes; a leading / anchors to the reference or target root.

replacements.description: Regex replacements applied sequentially to file paths and contents.

lineDeletions.description: Line ranges removed from specific target files before content replacements and annotation transforms.

environment.description: Semver constraints for tooling required by this project.

clay.description: Semver constraint for the Clay CLI/library version required by this project.

from.description: Pattern to match. A plain string is treated as a regular expression.

to.description: Replacement string. Supports ${n} capture-group interpolation (for example ${1}).

dotAll.description: When true, . matches newlines (RegExp dotAll flag).

multiLine.description: When true, ^ and $ match line boundaries (RegExp multiLine flag).

unicode.description: When true, enable Unicode-aware matching (RegExp unicode flag).

caseSensitive.description: When false, matching is case-insensitive (RegExp caseSensitive flag).

filePath.description: Path to the target file, relative to the target directory root (after path replacements).

ranges.description: Zero-based, inclusive line ranges to remove from filePath.
